title: Error Taxonomy, Wrapping, Retry Decisions, User Recovery, and Exit · Runtime Recall
summary: A delayed ranger review reconstructs error taxonomy, wrapping, retry decisions, user recovery, and exit from revision, command, arguments, request identity, response fixture, state transition, cache decision, goroutine ownership, output, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for causal recoverable Pokedex error contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Classify input, not found, protocol, timeout, cancellation, transport, decode, invariant, persistence, and internal errors by caller decision.
Wrap context with percent-w while preserving sentinel or typed matching and avoid exposing unstable internal prose as API.
Retry only explicitly transient idempotent work under attempt, time, spacing, cancellation, and fair-use budgets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
